title: hymenophyllum ovatum
intro: Hymenophyllum ovatum, also known as the ovate scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum ovatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
